mapper.select: SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate FROM todos
SELECT id, todo, detail, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, is_completed AS isCompleted, due_date AS dueDate FROM todos WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO todos ( todo, detail, created_at, updated_at, is_completed, due_date )
VALUES ( #{todo}, #{detail}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, false, #{dueDate} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE todos
SET todo = #{todo},
detail = #{detail},
is_completed = #{isCompleted},
due_date = #{dueDate},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
todo,
detail,
created_at AS createdAt,
updated_at AS updatedAt,
is_completed AS isCompleted,
due_date AS dueDate
FROM todos
WHERE todo LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM todos
WHERE is_completed = true
